## Structure

InfoResponse — multi-variant session/state response packet.
The first body byte after sub-op {@code 0x23} is a discriminator
that selects the variant.

```
[0]      0x23                   sub-opcode (constant)
[1]      variant discriminator   0x20 / 0x0e / 0x0f / 0x04 / etc.
[2..]    variant-specific body
```

Catalog samples:
```
20 00 10 00 00 00                                  zoneInfo (6B)
0e 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 01 00                       sessionInfo (10B)
04 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 01 00 00 00 14 12 00 00  zoneTransitionMeta (19B)
```

## Variants

| body[0] | size | name                  | use                         |
|--------:|-----:|-----------------------|-----------------------------|
| 0x20    | 6 B  | zoneInfo              | session/zone state ack      |
| 0x0e    | 10 B | sessionInfo           | session-flag init           |
| 0x0f    | 6 B  | postTransitionInfo    | post-zone-transition ack    |
| 0x04    | 19 B | zoneTransitionMeta    | pre-zoning meta + UID echo  |
| 0x12    | 9 B  | (other)               | session-state variant       |

### Variant 0x20 zoneInfo (most common)

```
20 00 ?? 00 00 00
```
Body[2] varies per session: `0x10` HANNIBAL, `0x01` NORMAN,
`0x84` DRSTONE3, `0x00` AUGUSTO. Likely a zone-state hash.

### Variant 0x0e sessionInfo

Fixed body `0e 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 01 00` across captures —
session initialization tag.

### Variant 0x04 zoneTransitionMeta

Verified against
{@code RETAIL_PLAZA_TO_PEPPER_CROSS_DISTRICT} 2026-05-02. Sent
by retail in response to Zoning1 (C→S {@code 0x03/0x22} sub
{@code 0x0d}). Format: 11 zero bytes + `03 00 00 00` + UID LE32.

## Observed contexts

Top markers correlate with major session events:
- `OUTSIDE_AREAM5_GENREP_TELE × 3` — GenRep teleport response
- `AFTER_ENTER_SEWER × 2` — sub-zone entry
- `TRADE_CASH_CONFIRM × 2` — trade ack
- `IN_WORLD × 2` — periodic during gameplay
- `MOB_AGGRO × 1` — combat-state notification

Concentration in RETAIL_VEHICLE_DRONE × 121 (large-session
captures emit many variants). Universal — 17/17 captures.

## Open questions

- Variant 0x12 9-byte form `12 00 07 00 00 00 00 00 00` — which
  session event triggers this?
- Body[2] of zoneInfo: looks like a zone-state hash but mapping
  to specific zones is unverified.

## Server-side handler

`server.gameserver.packets.server_udp.InfoResponse` — emits all
4 known variants via static factory methods:

- `InfoResponse.zoneInfo(pl)` — 0x20 6B
- `InfoResponse.sessionInfo(pl)` — 0x0e 10B
- `InfoResponse.postTransitionInfo(pl)` — 0x0f 6B
- `InfoResponse.zoneTransitionMeta(pl)` — 0x04 19B with UID LE32

Wired into:
- {@link
  server.gameserver.internalEvents.WorldEntryEvent} (initial burst)
- {@link
  server.gameserver.packets.client_udp.RequestPositionUpdate}
  (zoneInfo on 0x2a request — task #166 / #169)
- {@link
  server.gameserver.packets.client_udp.Zoning1} (zoneTransitionMeta)
